description_long: This is a rectangular vertical banner with a muted green background, prominently displaying the text 'LIHRA IMMOBILIEN' in white and gold, along with subtle geometric line accents. The banner is held taut between two cylindrical metal rods at the top and bottom, which are connected to a robust metal support structure. The support structure consists of two parallel arms extending from the back, likely for mounting onto a wall or pole. The banner material appears to be a durable, weather-resistant fabric or vinyl, suitable for outdoor use. The overall design is clean and professional, with a focus on real estate branding. The mounting hardware and rods are metallic, providing both stability and a modern aesthetic.
description: A vertical real estate banner with 'LIHRA IMMOBILIEN' branding, held between two metal rods and supported by a sturdy metal frame. The design is clean, modern, and suitable for outdoor urban placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full banner face with branding and geometric design, framed by top and bottom metal rods.
description_view_1: Top-down view revealing the parallel metal support arms and the cylindrical mounting hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but with less visibility of the printed content and more focus on the support structure.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view highlighting the underside of the support arms and the cylindrical rods, with the mounting hardware clearly visible.
